sinks.expression: printf( __( 'Publisher ID is you can investigate from the %s > Account information page.', 'vk-all-in-one-expansion-unit' ), $link )
printf( __( 'To disable this setting, go to Settings > Reading and uncheck "Discourage search engines from indexing this site".', 'vk-all-in-one-expansion-unit' ), esc_url( $reading_settings_url ) )
printf( __( 'Normally "%1$s" is placed in the title tags of all the pages.', 'vk-all-in-one-expansion-unit' ), $sitetitle_link )

printf( __( 'For example, it appears in the form of
<title>page title | %1$s</title>
if using a static page.', 'vk-all-in-one-expansion-unit' ), $sitetitle_link )

printf( __( 'In the top page will be output usually in the form of
<title>%1$s | %2$s</title>', 'vk-all-in-one-expansion-unit' ), $sitetitle_link, $tagline_link )
printf( __( 'If you specify the content of the title tag in %s, that will take precedence.', 'vk-all-in-one-expansion-unit' ), $edit_link )
fwrite(STDERR, 'Composer detected issues in your platform:' . PHP_EOL.PHP_EOL . implode(PHP_EOL, $issues) . PHP_EOL.PHP_EOL)
